question: Please give a 1-minute self-introduction.
Introduce your most representative project and elaborate on your specific contributions.
Why are you applying for this role?
Why are you interested in our company?
Which part of your previous experience best demonstrates your fit for this role?
What is your career plan for the next 3 to 5 years?
What is the most challenging project you have worked on recently?
What do you consider to be your greatest strength?
Tell me about a time you disagreed with a teammate. How did you resolve it?
If a PM or manager proposes a requirement that you think is unreasonable, what would you do?
How do you explain a complex technical concept to a non-technical audience?
Tell me about a time you failed or made a severe mistake. What did you learn and how did you remedy it?
How do you balance 'speed' and 'quality' when working under pressure?
Which programming languages are you most familiar with, and which one do you use most often?
What is the difference between a list and a tuple in Python?
What is time complexity? What are some common time complexities?
What is the difference between WHERE and HAVING in SQL?
Can you explain the difference between INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, and RIGHT JOIN?
What is overfitting, and how do you prevent or solve it?
What is the purpose of train, validation, and test splits?
Explain precision, recall, F1-score, and AUC, and discuss when each is appropriate to use.
What is data leakage in machine learning?
Explain the bias-variance tradeoff.
Write a SQL query to find the first order date for each user.
How would you write a SQL query to calculate DAU (Daily Active Users) over the past 7 days?
Write a SQL query to calculate user next-day retention.
Which SQL window functions have you used? Examples: ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), LAG()?
How do you define a North Star metric for an e-commerce platform?
If the PM says 'Conversion rate has dropped recently,' how would you approach the analysis?
What is cohort analysis and when should it be used?
What is the general workflow of an A/B test?
What are Type I and Type II errors?
What are the core differences between Random Forest and XGBoost?
Explain the difference between bagging and boosting.
What is the core idea behind SVM, and what is the kernel trick?
What is the principle behind PCA? Why can it be used for dimensionality reduction?
What is the Central Limit Theorem?
How do you deal with class imbalance in a dataset?
If a model performs well on the training set but poorly on the test set, how would you troubleshoot?
How would you design a machine learning model to predict user churn?
What is the difference between feature drift and concept drift?
How do you prevent training-serving skew?
What is the differences between batch inference and real-time inference?
What is shadow deployment and canary deployment?
In deep learning, what occurs when the batch size is too large vs too small?
What is LoRA? Why is it considered resource-efficient?
Explain the general layout and flow of a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system.
What is the difference between an Array and a Linked List?
What are the common differences between Depth-First Search (DFS) and Breadth-First Search (BFS)?
Explain the concept of Dynamic Programming. How does it contrast with a Greedy algorithm?
How would you detect if a linked list has a cycle?
What are the three main pillars of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)?
What is the difference between a GET and a POST HTTP request?
How would you handle high concurrent requests hitting your application layer?
Design a highly scalable rate limiter.
In your most recent project, what was the primary business problem you aimed to solve?
Why did you choose this specific framework or method instead of alternatives in your project?
What was the single most difficult technical challenge you encountered, and how did you overcome it?
If you could do that project all over again, what architectural or modeling step would you change?
How did you guarantee that your project conclusion/metrics were correct and not just anecdotal inferences?
